title: PMF Experiment Manifest
description: Defines a single PMF experiment that the runner, dispatch Lambda, gp-api, and gp-webapp all consume from S3.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to the meta-schema. Lets editors (VSCode, JetBrains) auto-complete fields and show per-field descriptions on hover. Not consumed by runtime.

id.description: Stable identifier. Snake_case. Used in EXPERIMENT_ID env var, S3 paths, and as foreign key in ExperimentRun rows.

version.description: Bump on every published change. Surfaced in index.json so consumers can detect drift.

max_turns.description: Agent loop budget. Sonnet typically needs 25-50 for non-trivial experiments; 100 for multi-step web+databricks. Not strictly enforced — agent may exceed slightly.

timeout_seconds.description: Wall-clock cap on the Fargate runner. After this, runner exits and emits `failed` callback. Default 1200 (20 min); 3000 for heavy multi-step.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema Draft-07 for the params dict the dispatcher passes the agent (PARAMS_JSON env var). Lambda validates the SQS message's params against this before launching Fargate. Replaces the older `required_params` field — supports types + patterns + constraints, not just key names.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema Draft-07 for the artifact JSON the agent writes to /workspace/output/<id>.json. The runner validates the artifact against this before publishing to s3://gp-agent-artifacts-{env}/{id}/{run_id}/artifact.json. Used for codegen of TS interfaces in gp-webapp.

output_constraints.description: Optional cross-field constraints on the output (array_length, equals, enums, ranges, exact_ids) the bare schema can't express.

scope.description: Per-experiment broker scope: which Databricks tables the runner is allowed to query, and the per-query row cap. Omitted = no Databricks access (web-only experiment).

allowed_tables.description: Fully-qualified Databricks table names (catalog.schema.table). Broker SQL rewriter rejects queries against tables not on this list.

max_rows.description: Per-query row cap enforced by the broker.

l2DistrictType.description: L2 voter file column name for district (e.g. City_Ward).

l2DistrictName.description: L2 district value to match (e.g. FAYETTEVILLE CITY WARD 2).
